description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and a sprawling, L-shaped footprint. The exterior combines smooth white surfaces with sections of textured gray stone, creating a contemporary aesthetic. Large horizontal windows are set into the main facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The structure is surrounded by a green lawn, and a detached white garage or outbuilding sits adjacent to the main house. The rooflines are clean and unembellished, emphasizing the minimalist architectural style. The overall layout suggests open-plan living spaces and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and gray stone exterior, large horizontal windows, and a detached white garage on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large horizontal windows, and the detached white garage to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, the white garage in the foreground, and the L-shaped layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with more horizontal windows and the garage on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stone-clad section and the overall depth of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large horizontal windows on main facade
